contacts.name: Alex Rivera
contacts.communication_notes: Always use a formal tone for emails to leadership; prefers bullet points over long prose. Loop Alex in on client-facing decisions.

contacts.name: Sarah Chen
contacts.communication_notes: Very formal. Always address as Ms. Chen. Never send on Fridays — she's offline.

contacts.name: David Kim
contacts.communication_notes: Async preferred. Responds faster on Slack than email.

contacts.name: David Kim
contacts.communication_notes: Works on backend platform. CC ops@company.io on deploy emails.

contacts.name: David Okafor
contacts.communication_notes: Prefers concise updates. CC his assistant (maya@okafor.io) on all client email threads.

contacts.name: Maya Patel
contacts.communication_notes: Project coordinator for client accounts. Schedules tenders and keeps timelines updated.

common_mistakes: Forgetting to CC maya@okafor.io on David Okafor threads
Scheduling meetings during the protected noon hour
Missing env var DATABASE_URL on staging deploys

episodic.summary: Prepared and sent weekly report with action items highlighted for Alex.
Drafted Q2 renewal email to Ms. Chen; kept tone very formal and addressed her as Ms. Chen.
Investigated production outage; root cause was misconfigured environment variables. Added remediation notes.
Followed up on invoice reminders for two clients.
